content.rendered:
learn about Poxst

About Us

Professional Toy Sourcing Agent

About
Poxst

Poxst is a toy sourcing company based in china but serves a global clientele who seek to import toys from china. The company is located Yiwu, China which is the home of the largest toy wholesale market but also has a branch in Shantou another epicenter of toy suppliers in china. Considering the risks that are involved when sourcing for toys from china, Poxst seeks to safely eliminate any inconvenience that one might encounter while trying to buy toys in china from the supplier or the toy factory. With Poxst team on the ground, you can be assured they will handle matters regarding the sourcing of the toys from the best manufacturer, the quality of the toys, the payments, follow-up on your order, monitor the shipping till you get your order. Hire us if you need a toy sourcing agent with more than 10 years’ experience and has served more than 1500+ clients.

Why choose Poxst Sourcing Agency?
+ More than 10 years’ experience in Sourcing toys for global clients from China.
+ Factory sourcing which is direct buying from dependable manufactures which makes the toys less costly, and of the required quality.
+ Great communication skills
+ Proactive use of expertness from Purchasing, Quality to shipping.

0 +
Toys Factory

We have cooperation with 1500+ toy factories that provide strong supply chain support.

0 +
Toys type

There are more than 130 toys in our database， we can provide you with a quote for all the toys you want.

0 +
sourcing staff

We have more than 30 sourcing staff in Yiwu and Shantou, ready to provide you with professional toy agency services.

0 +
Happy Clients

We have provided toys sourcing services to 1500 customers, help them buy toys in China and shipping out.

Get help for sourcing toys from China toy supplier

GET HELP

Your toys sourcing agent can help everything with importing from China

About Founder

Zero Chan

Zero Chan is the founder of dtsupplier (Poxst), he has over a decade of expertise in the Chinese toy market industry. He is a master of the Chinese toy market and has a deep understanding of his oversees client’s needs. If you’re looking for a toy sourcing agent from China who understands where to source toys from in china, how to buy toys in wholesale from china and the best toy manufacturers and suppliers then his company Poxst Service is the best toy sourcing company to go for. In the last 2 years alone he has sourced toys for over 1500 toy importers from all over the world who were looking to import toys from china. Through him you are guaranteed to save 30% of the total cost when shipping from china.

Meet Our Team

Elaine Chan

Sales Manager

Aron Chan

Sales Manager

Michelle Xue

Sales Manager

“Helping you improve toy business in China，it's the mission of Poxst Service”

Our Services

Market Guide

We guide you to toys market in yiwu or shantou, and find the suitable toy factory and get the best price.

Market Online

Pick the toys and put them in the shopping cart, it’s easy for you, your agent will help you the left things.

Toys Sourcing

Send us the link above Amazon, Alibaba, or even a photo on google, your agent will quote to you.

Free Catalog

organize the new toys to our catalog every month, you just need download our catalog to sourcing.

One-on-one Service

professional agent will one-on-one service for you, select the toys you want, and leave the rest to your agent.

Low To 3% Commission

The charge of service commission is low to 3%，but the toys sourcing experience is over 100%.

We Will Help You Every Step Of The Way

Toys market guide, toys sourcing, toys market online, import toys from China, we are your best partner in China.

Contact Us
Facebook-f Linkedin Youtube
